header_title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

header_subtitle.text: Descobrir de recèptas del torn del mond
header_subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Navigar per de recèptas autenticas de cosinas del torn del mond
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

recipe_card_medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

recipe_card_hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Nom de la recepta Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Brou ric de òsses de porc amb chashu tendre, òu passat a l'aiga doça, e nòdas frescas.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Descripción de la recepta Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Nom de la recepta Piza Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Piza napolitana classica amb tomatas San Marzano, mozzarella fresca, e basilic.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Descripción de la recepta Piza Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Nom de la recepta Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos de porc marinats amb pina, coriandre e cebas sus tortillas de milh.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Descripción de la recepta Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Nom de la recepta Pollastre al Burre.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Pollastre tendre dins una salsa cremosa de tomata e burre amb espècias aromàticas.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Descripción de la recepta Pollastre al Burre.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Nom de la recepta Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Nòdas de ris saltejadas amb camarons, tofù, cacahuètes e salsa de tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Descripción de la recepta Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Nom de la recepta Crèpas Francesas.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crèpas finas e delicadas emplenadas amb Nutella, fragoletas frescas e crema batuda.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Descripción de la recepta Crèpas Francesas.

locale_switcher_label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

locale_switcher_en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

locale_switcher_es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
